_comment: T2.6 — Route agent system tasks through ModelRouter. No hardcoded model IDs. Config-driven via /config/model_policy.json. See blueprint Appendix A.

rules.name: security_critical_gate
rules.description: Tasks tagged security_critical MUST NOT run on Sonnet or Grok tiers

rules.name: model_router_mandate
rules.description: No component or route ever names a model directly — all reasoning calls go through ModelRouter

rules.name: brand_string_mandate
rules.description: All contact/social/legal strings must resolve from brand.ts, never hardcoded
